services.name: Event Hubs
services.description: Streams multimodal events and messages into the platform

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Orchestrates streaming processing and AI service calls

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Generates text and vision-enabled AI responses

services.name: Application Insights
services.description: Collects application telemetry and model usage signals

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Centralizes monitoring and alerting for the platform

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Stores and queries platform telemetry and logs

connections.label: Issue authenticated access tokens for streaming clients
Deliver incoming multimodal events for stream processing
Send audio payloads for real-time transcription
Submit extracted text for multilingual translation
Invoke text and vision prompts for model inference
Emit request traces, latency, and model telemetry
Forward application telemetry for platform-wide monitoring
Store metrics and logs for cross-resource analysis

workflow.description: Users and streaming producers authenticate before publishing multimodal events into the ingest pipeline.
Event Hubs receives audio, text, and image payloads and triggers downstream processing.
Azure Functions routes audio streams to Speech Services for real-time transcription.
Azure Functions sends transcribed and extracted text to Translator for multilingual normalization.
Azure Functions invokes Azure OpenAI for text and vision inference to generate model outputs.
Application telemetry and model usage metrics flow from the compute layer into the monitoring stack.

metadata.prompt: A multi-modal AI platform with Azure OpenAI for text and vision, Azure AI Speech for real-time transcription, Azure AI Translator for multilingual support, Event Hubs for streaming ingest, and Application Insights for model observability
